name: copilot-quota-alert
description: Monitor token-priced GitHub Copilot AI Credit usage and get alerts when exceeding your safe daily quota based on working days.

commands.title: Copilot Quota Alert: Authenticate with GitHub
Copilot Quota Alert: Check Quota Details
Copilot Quota Alert: Check for Updates
Copilot Quota Alert: Show Daily Usage Report

copilot-quota-alert.thresholdPercent.description: Alert threshold offset in percentage points. Positive = allow usage above safe quota by this amount before alerting. Negative = alert before reaching safe quota. Example: 5 means alert only when usage exceeds safe quota by 5%.

copilot-quota-alert.extraHolidayCount.description: Number of extra holidays to deduct from the total working days this month. Automatically resets to 0 at the start of a new month.

copilot-quota-alert.monthlyAiCreditLimit.description: Fallback monthly GitHub AI Credit allowance. The extension automatically uses GitHub's live included and additional-usage entitlements when available; this value is used only when the fallback billing endpoint does not report a total.

copilot-quota-alert.refreshIntervalMinut.description: How often (in minutes) to automatically refresh the quota data.

copilot-quota-alert.checkForUpdates.description: Automatically check for new versions on GitHub when the extension activates.
